title: Workspace Configuration
description: Core workspace settings — name, path, and directory structure

fields.prompt: What would you like to name this workspace?
Where is the workspace root directory?

title: Git Configuration
description: Git host, organisation, and repositories to clone

fields.prompt: Which git hosting platform do you use? (e.g., gitlab, github, gitea)
What is your organisation or group name on the git host?
Which repositories should be cloned into the workspace?
